---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for TransitCore.
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

Thank you for taking the time to suggest an improvement for TransitCore.

Before submitting:

- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests.
- [ ] This feature has not already been suggested.
- [ ] This suggestion fits the vision of TransitCore.

---

# Summary

Provide a short description of your idea.

---

# Problem

Is your feature request related to a problem?

If yes, describe the problem you are trying to solve.

---

# Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you would like to see implemented.

Explain how it should work.

---

# Alternatives

Have you considered another solution?

If yes, describe it.

---

# Benefits

How would this feature improve TransitCore?

Who would benefit from it?

---

# Additional Information

Attach sketches, screenshots, references or any additional information that could help explain your proposal.
